ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "screen_name" TEXT /* Twitter handle of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "t_counts" INTEGER /* Number of characters in the tweet */,
  "status_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the tweet status */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user who posted the tweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tweet was created */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the tweet */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source application used to post the tweet */,
  "reply_to_status_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the tweet being replied to */,
  "reply_to_user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user being replied to */,
  "reply_to_screen_name" TEXT /* Twitter handle of the user being replied to */,
  "is_quote" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet is a quote */,
  "is_retweet" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet is a retweet */,
  "favourites_count" INTEGER /* Number of favorites the tweet has received */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of retweets the tweet has received */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the user's location */,
  "place_full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user's location */,
  "place_type" TEXT /* Type of the user's location */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "friends_count" INTEGER /* Number of friends the user has */,
  "account_lang" TEXT /* Language of the user's account */,
  "account_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's account was created */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is verified */,
  "lang" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Numerical score representing the sentiment of the tweet */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Categorical label representing the sentiment of the tweet */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Combined score of likes, retweets, and replies to gauge overall engagement */,
  "is_sensitive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet contains sensitive content */,
  "has_media" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet includes any media */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media attached to the tweet */,
  "hashtags" TEXT /* JSON array of hashtags used in the tweet */,
  "mentions" TEXT /* JSON array of user mentions in the tweet */,
  "location_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the tweet's location */,
  "is_promoted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet is a promoted (ad) tweet */,
  "language_detection" TEXT /* Detected language of the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES tweet_sources ("source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES locations ("country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "screen_name" TEXT /* Twitter handle of the user */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "friends_count" INTEGER /* Number of friends the user has */,
  "account_lang" TEXT /* Language of the user's account */,
  "account_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's account was created */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is verified */,
  "lang" TEXT /* Language of the user's account */,
  "location_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the user's location */,
  "profile_bio" TEXT /* User's bio text */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "is_protected" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is protected */,
  "is_bot" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is a bot */,
  "profile_creation_source" TEXT /* How the user's account was created (e.g., 'Web', 'Mobile', 'Third-party') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet being engaged with */,
  "favourites_count" INTEGER /* Number of favorites the tweet has received */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of retweets the tweet has received */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies the tweet has received */,
  "quote_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been quoted */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Ratio of engagement (likes + retweets + replies + quotes) to the number of followers */,
  "engagement_timestamps" TEXT /* JSON array of timestamps when engagement occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the location */,
  "place_full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the location */,
  "place_type" TEXT /* Type of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source application */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the source application's website */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the source application */,
  "source_popularity" INTEGER /* Numerical score indicating the popularity of the source application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
